waves.title: Foundation
waves.goal: Auth, launch restore, mobile auth contracts, root shell guards, and shared loading/error/empty patterns.

waves.title: Top-Level Screens
waves.goal: Deliver the first runnable tab-level screens backed by mobile summary/list endpoints.

waves.title: Core Flows
waves.goal: Implement the primary interactive training and arena flows with end-to-end state handling.

waves.title: Content And Hardening
waves.goal: Finish briefing/history/detail flows, diagnostics hardening, telemetry, and cross-screen consistency.

items.title: Auth & Launch
verification: 登录成功后 token 写入 Keychain 且冷启动可恢复
token 失效时能回退到登录态并清理本地会话
未登录时无法进入受保护业务页

executionLog.summary: Implemented mobile auth route contracts, shared server auth helpers, and bearer token issue/verify for login/register/me/refresh/logout.
executionLog.verification: npx vitest run app/api/mobile/v1/auth/route.test.ts lib/auth/__tests__/shared.test.ts lib/auth/__tests__/mobile.test.ts actions/__tests__/auth.test.ts (4 files, 21 tests passed)

executionLog.summary: Added iOS mobile auth models/endpoints, auth session service, persisted auth environment tracking, launch restore coordination, and supporting networking tests.
executionLog.verification: OpusApp-Local targeted tests passed on iPhone 17 Pro simulator: AuthSessionServiceTests, LaunchCoordinatorTests, KeychainTokenStoreTests, URLSessionAPIClientTests, RequestBuilderTests (16 tests passed)

executionLog.summary: Moved auth gating to the app root, added native login/register flows, wired diagnostics token clearing through coordinator logout, and fixed live runtime config fallback so cold launch restore reaches the authenticated shell.
executionLog.verification: OpusApp-Local targeted tests passed on iPhone 17 Pro simulator: AuthSessionServiceTests, LaunchCoordinatorTests, KeychainTokenStoreTests, RequestBuilderTests, URLSessionAPIClientTests, RuntimeConfigTests (21 tests passed). Simulator smoke verified unauthenticated launch -> login screen, successful login -> dashboard shell, and cold relaunch -> restored dashboard; unauthorized invalidation remains covered by AuthSessionServiceTests and LaunchCoordinatorTests.

executionLog.summary: Added shared Opus content-state primitives and applied them to app launch loading, auth guidance/error banners, diagnostics health states, and dashboard placeholder tabs, with preview coverage for loading, empty, and error variants.
executionLog.verification: npm run ios:generate && xcodebuild -project ios/OpusApp.xcodeproj -scheme OpusApp-Local -destination id=B807C4C7-1556-4C58-9AD1-3342CA4BC243 test (** TEST SUCCEEDED **, 27 tests passed). Simulator smoke verified diagnostics empty-state card + CTA and training-tab empty placeholder; cold relaunch still restored directly into the authenticated shell after the shared-state integration.

items.title: Home
verification: 首页在登录态下可拉取 summary 并稳定渲染
加载态、空态、错误态都有明确展示
Diagnostics 入口保留且可达

items.title: Training Hub
verification: 训练页展示所有模式入口且无重复职责
不可用模式有明确降级提示
从训练页进入后续会话时参数完整

items.title: Session Runner
verification: 各 mode 能正确分发题型与完成页
空队列与错误态不会卡死在会话中
回流请求遵守纯语法题不写 FSRS 的现有规则

items.title: Arena Dashboard
verification: 概览页支持雷达图、薄弱点与矩阵切换
空数据时有明确兜底展示
能稳定跳转到 Part 5 与 Mission

items.title: Arena Part 5
verification: 作答反馈、解析与下一题链路连通
Arena telemetry 与 FSRS 回流都符合 Web 现状
纯语法题不会误写 FSRS

items.title: Arena Mission
verification: 长文、多空位和底部答题 dock 状态一致
cache miss 有可感知但可恢复的兜底行为
错题快照与 attempt 提交字段完整

items.title: Vocabulary
verification: 搜索、筛选、排序和分页参数映射正确
详情页字段补齐并能从列表进入
空结果和网络失败可区分

items.title: Briefing Console
verification: 生成参数校验在提交前完成
生成中的流式状态可取消或恢复
鉴权失败时能正确回退

items.title: Briefing Reader
verification: 阅读器可稳定恢复正文与上下文
Wand 查词与分析流在成功和失败时都有明确反馈
阅读状态与返回路径不会丢失

items.title: Briefing History
verification: 历史列表筛选、删除、进入详情行为一致
空态和删除确认行为明确
删除后本地列表与服务端状态同步

items.title: Diagnostics
verification: 环境切换、健康检查、token 清理都可见且可操作
清 token 后会正确回到未登录路径
接口不可达时有明确错误信息
